title: paraprasophyllum copelandii
intro: Paraprasophyllum copelandii is a type of orchid native to Australia. It is also known as the Copeland's Paraprasophyllum or more commonly as the Midge Orchid, and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties. The plant is believed to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which may help alleviate various health issues such as skin conditions and respiratory problems. In herbal preparations, the plant's roots are often used to make infusions or tinctures, although further research is needed to fully understand its potential health benefits.
